item.title: Talk at the ADRIADAPT Conference (in Croatian)
item.description:
Scientific talk at the Adriadapt Conference

In June 2021 Igor Ružić and I presented the results of a coastal vulnerability study for the Šibenik pilot area, which we performed as external experts for the ADRIADAPT Project. I talked about the climate change impacts on the hydrological and coastal processes in the Šibenik pilot area, as well as the coastal and urban flooding and their implication for the vulnerability of the coastal infrastructure. The talk (in Croatian) was recorded and can be viewed on Youtube.

item.title: Interview for an online magazine Stilueta
item.description:
Iterview for Stilueta

In March 2020 I gave an interview for an online magazine Stilueta, where I talked about my scientific work, life as a scientist, my background, and free time.

item.title: Scientific talk for the Radio Rijeka
item.description:
Iterview for radio Rijeka

In the January of 2020 I gave an interview for a local radio station Rijeka, and I talked about my scientific work, current research and future plans.

item.title: Award for the best scientist at the University of Rijeka in 2018 in technical and biotechnical sciences
item.description: In December 2019, I received an award from Scientific Foundation for the best scientist at the University of Rijeka for 2018 in technical and biotechnical sciences.
